overview: Ruby Storm is a red combo deck that leverages cheap spells and mana acceleration to cast Jeska's Will for lethal damage. It uses pump spells like Seething Song to boost the win condition while maintaining early pressure. The deck aims to close games quickly before opponents can establish board control or draw answers.
win_conditions: Casting Jeska's Will for lethal damage
Boosting Jeska's Will with Seething Song or other pump spells
Overwhelming opponents with early aggressive threats and spell synergy

keep_criteria: Hands with early mana sources and acceleration
At least one cheap spell or pump spell
Access to Jeska's Will by turn 3 or 4
Keep hands with 2-3 fetchable/untapped lands, Ruby Medallion, and at least 2-3 cheap red spells (Seething Song, Lightning Bolt, etc.).
Keep Jeska's Will only if paired with mana acceleration or draw.
mulligan_criteria: Lack of early interaction or card draw
Mulligan hands with 0-1 lands, multiple Ruby Medallions, or expensive spells without acceleration.

early_game: Play lands and activate Ruby Medallion for mana acceleration
Cast cheap spells to build storm count and draw cards
Apply early pressure with low-cost threats
Turn 1: Play a land, cast a cheap red spell if available to start storm count and generate mana.
Turn 2: Play a land, cast Ruby Medallion if possible, and continue sequencing cheap spells to build mana and storm.
Prioritize untapped lands and fetching basics to maximize Ruby Medallion synergy.
mid_game: Stabilize board state and continue drawing cards
Set up pump spells and ensure Jeska's Will is accessible
Disrupt opponent's game plan with targeted removal
every spell cast this turn increases your win condition's power.
Manage mana to ensure you can cast your combo turn without leaving yourself vulnerable.
Use Jeska's Will to recycle key pieces or generate extra turns, but avoid overcommitting to recursion if you can win outright.
Hold back on casting expensive spells early unless you have a clear path to combo.
Commit threats only when you can protect them or when you're ready to go for the win.
late_game: Execute Jeska's Will combo for lethal damage
Use remaining pump spells to maximize damage output
Maintain card advantage to close out the game
High-storm win conditions (e.g., Tendrils of Agony, Firemind's Research) or Jeska's Will chains that cast multiple win conditions or generate extra turns.
Win by casting a high-storm spell when you have enough count, or by using Jeska's Will to bypass interaction and close the game.
Go all-in when you have enough storm count to win, or when you can safely cast Jeska's Will to generate extra turns/recursion.
Commit when the opponent has no interaction left, is tapped out, or when you can protect your combo with spot removal or timing.

key_cards.name: Jeska's Will
key_cards.notes: Cast for massive damage, ideally on a turn with pump spells to boost the storm count and overall damage.

key_cards.name: Ruby Medallion
key_cards.notes: Activates to produce red mana, enabling faster casting of Jeska's Will and pump spells. Prioritize early activation.

key_cards.name: Seething Song
key_cards.notes: Boosts Jeska's Will damage and adds to the storm count. Cast on the same turn as Jeska's Will for maximum effect.

sequencing_tips: Prioritize mana acceleration in the early turns to enable faster combo execution
Hold pump spells until the turn you plan to cast Jeska's Will
Use cheap spells to build storm count and draw into key pieces
Sequence removal to clear blockers or key threats before going for lethal
Common mistakes include overcommitting to board wipes, forgetting to count storm, mismanaging mana for Jeska's Will recursion, and not tracking opponent interaction.
Unique interactions: Jeska's Will can be cast from the graveyard with certain effects, allowing extra turns.
Ruby Medallion makes red spells cheaper, enabling more storm count.
Always prioritize untapped lands for Ruby Medallion synergy, and remember that Jeska's Will can be used to cast multiple win conditions in a single turn if sequenced correctly.

matchups.advice: Race their hand size and look for openings to cast Jeska's Will when they lack counterspells.
Use pump spells early to boost Jeska's Will and close the game before they stabilize.
Disrupt their setup with targeted interaction and race to lethal with Jeska's Will.

Use Jeska's Will to cast spells in response to counters, or chain cheap spells to out-value counters. Cast win conditions at the end of the opponent's turn or when they have no mana. Use recursion to bypass counters and win before they can respond.

Apply early pressure with cheap spells to disrupt their mana base. Use spot removal to kill key mana sources. Go for the combo quickly before they stabilize, and use Jeska's Will to generate extra turns if needed to close the game.

Out-value them with better sequencing and storm count management. Use Jeska's Will to generate extra turns or recursion. Prioritize protecting your combo and use spot removal to clear their threats. Win by going off first or by out-recursing with Jeska's Will chains.

common_threats: Watch for counterspells, discard, or board wipes.
Note when opponents tap out for interaction or hold up mana.
Track graveyard contents if they have recursion.
Monitor mana acceleration from Tron or ramp decks, and watch for Delver/Tempo threats that can disrupt your sequencing.
